---
title: Full Name
last: Last Name
first: First Name
people_group: postdoc | gradstudent | researcher | undergrad | alumni
subtitle: Postdoctoral Fellow | Graduate Student | Research Assistant | etc
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: fa-brands-bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: bluesky link
    - icon: mortarboard 
      text: Google Scholar
      href: google scholar link
    - icon: fa-house 
      text: Profile
      href: website link
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:email
---

<hr>


:::{#about}

Description
